blog.title: Learn more about Ditto & AI-powered CSR compliance

esg.title: ESG: Definition, Criteria and Challenges
esg.excerpt: ESG — Environment, Social, Governance — structures the sustainable transformation of companies. It encompasses the practices, policies and indicators that help reconcile economic performance with positive impact on society and the planet.

csr.title: CSR: A Clear Definition and Scope
csr.excerpt: Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) structures an organisation's contribution to sustainable and ethical development. Its scope, built on precise principles, connects strategic management, measurable performance and regulatory compliance.

responsibility.title: What is Corporate Social Responsibility?
responsibility.excerpt: Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) structures an organisation's commitment to society and the environment. Understanding its foundations, its impact on compliance and CSR performance helps build a credible, long-term sustainability strategy.

hero.title: Your team's single source of truth for CSR and compliance
hero.paragraph: No more searching across documents or chasing down answers—Ditto gives you everything you need to manage your team's CSR and compliance, right where you need it.

header.title: See the full picture and step toward your goals with confidence

feature1.label: Centralized dashboard
feature1.title: Centralize your compliance data and easily identify gaps
feature1.paragraph: When it comes to compliance, knowing can be half the battle. Ditto gives you a central view into your company's documents and activities, so you can identify gaps and areas for improvement.

feature2.label: Progress tracking
feature2.title: Set big goals and track your progress toward them
feature2.paragraph: Set measurable goals and realistic deadlines, then mobilize your team to make it happen. With Ditto, you'll have a clear view of each objective's status to keep you on track.

feature3.label: Knowledge base
feature3.title: Keep a record of all your important information
feature3.paragraph: Ditto is your living history of past assessments and actions. Need to know when a policy changed or a process was implemented? Just ask Ditto.

midCta.title: See it in action
midCta.paragraph: Book a demo and see how Ditto centralizes your compliance program.

testimonials.title: Hear it from our customers
testimonials.text: Customers of all sizes love Ditto for its simplicity, smarts, and impact, above all.

cta.title: Ready to get compliant? Ditto.
cta.paragraph: Turn your CSR program into a strategic advantage with a compliance copilot that's with you every step of the way.

hero.title: Automate CSR & compliance questionnaires
hero.paragraph: No more chasing scattered answers or outdated spreadsheets. Ditto centralizes your questionnaires, reuses past responses, and speeds up reporting, so that your team can stay focused.

header.title: Answer faster, report smarter
header.text: Say goodbye to repetitive copy-paste. With Ditto, you collect once and reuse forever. Track progress, assign responsibilities, and ensure every answer is justified and audit-ready—without the usual back and forth.

feature1.label: Drag & drop import
feature1.title: Import any questionnaire with a simple drag and drop
feature1.paragraph: Upload Excel, Word, or PDF files directly into Ditto. We detect questions automatically and match them to your existing data—so you can skip the formatting chaos.

feature2.label: AI-powered answers
feature2.title: Let AI draft your answers from verified sources
feature2.paragraph: Our engine pulls from your validated content—policies, KPIs, certifications—and drafts first responses automatically. Then you can assign to the right team member for review and sign-off.

feature3.label: Intelligent knowledge base
feature3.title: Turn each answer into reusable intelligence
feature3.paragraph: Every answer you verify can be saved to your internal library. Choose what gets reused, refine over time, and improve AI suggestions with every questionnaire.

feature4.label: Instant help, anywhere
feature4.title: Can't upload your questionnaire? No problem.
feature4.paragraph: Use our browser extension to get contextual answers wherever you are—client portals, shared folders, or inboxes. Or just ask a question in the Ditto workspace.

midCta.title: Not sure where to start?
midCta.paragraph: Talk to an expert and see how Ditto fits your compliance workflow.

testimonials.title: Don't take our word for it. Take theirs.
testimonials.text: Customers of all sizes love Ditto for its simplicity, smarts, and impact, above all.

cta.title: Ready to get compliant? Ditto.
cta.paragraph: Streamline every questionnaire with a platform built for clarity, speed, and scale.

hero.title: AI solutions built for sustainability and compliance teams
hero.paragraph: From gap analysis to final reports, Ditto's AI assistants help sustainability teams move faster and work smarter across frameworks such as CSRD, EcoVadis, CDP, and ISO.

header.title: AI assistants designed to augment your CSR & compliance capabilities

feature1.label: Gap analysis & roadmap
feature1.title: Generate instant work plans based on any framework
feature1.paragraph: Upload a framework or questionnaire. Ditto compares it to your current documentation and instantly maps out what's missing and what to do next.

feature2.label: Framework experts
feature2.title: Access expert advice whenever you need it
feature2.paragraph: Use 24/7 expert chats for EcoVadis, CDP, CSRD, or ISO. Whether you need help phrasing an answer or clarifying a requirement, you'll get an instant response backed by verified knowledge.

feature3.label: Document review & formalization
feature3.title: Write or review policies, procedures, and plans
feature3.paragraph: Need a Code of Conduct? An environmental policy? Upload your draft or ask for a new one—our AI assistant helps write, structure, or assess every document you need.

feature4.label: Questionnaire module & RFPs
feature4.title: Reuse your best answers across clients and formats
feature4.paragraph: Auto-complete customer questionnaires, RFPs, or audits using your validated answers and proofs. Ditto helps you respond faster and stay consistent.

feature5.label: Report generation
feature5.title: Draft sustainability reports in minutes, not weeks
feature5.paragraph: From ISO 14001 summaries to CSRD climate sections, Ditto builds draft reports from your data and history, ready for human review and export.

testimonials.title: Don't take our word for it. Take theirs.
testimonials.text: Customers using Ditto's AI assistants don't just move faster—they build stronger, smarter compliance programs without the chaos.

cta.title: Ready to get compliant? Ditto.
cta.paragraph: Deploy purpose-built AI assistants across your workflow, from gap analysis to customer answers and final reports.

hero.title: Engage your suppliers in your sustainability journey
hero.paragraph: Ditto combines embedded expertise and smart tools to help you onboard, assess, and support your suppliers—so they move forward with you, not behind you.

header.title: (re)Connect your procurement strategy and your field reality
header.text: Your supplier strategy is clear—but execution often gets stuck in manual work, low engagement, or one-sided requests. Ditto helps you bring your partners on board, with structure, relevance, and the tools to act.

feature1.label: Strategic alignment
feature1.title: Bring your suppliers along in your sustainability roadmap
feature1.paragraph: Define your priorities, map your risks, and set up a scalable supplier engagement plan. Ditto helps you operationalize your strategy and turn intentions into measurable action.

feature2.label: Supplier questionnaires
feature2.title: Build and send custom questionnaires effortlessly
feature2.paragraph: Create multilingual, standards-aligned questionnaires tailored to your suppliers. Suppliers get an intuitive interface, smart AI support, and the ability to reuse their data—so they engage faster and with fewer questions.

feature3.label: Engagement tracking
feature3.title: Track responses and identify where to follow up
feature3.paragraph: Follow completions live, send reminders in one click, and segment your view by region, category, or maturity, so no supplier falls through the cracks.

midCta.title: Let's talk about your supplier program
midCta.paragraph: Tell us about your suppliers and we'll show you how Ditto can help.

testimonials.title: Make it easier for your suppliers to work with you
testimonials.text: With Ditto, suppliers don't just fill out a form. They get guidance, can reuse answers, and see their own progress. That's how you make ESG reporting feel like a shared journey, not a one-sided ask.

cta.title: Ready to engage your suppliers? Ditto.
cta.paragraph: Structure your sustainable procurement program, bring your suppliers along, and turn your goals into shared action.

hero.title: We're here to help businesses build trust and build better, together
hero.subtitle: Every partner you pick, every supplier you choose, every customer you serve—they're all a part of your story. But building trust across them? It's not easy. We started Ditto to change that.

belief1.title: We think great partners make great businesses
belief1.description: A great partner can help you scale faster, work smarter, and grow in ways you couldn't imagine. That's the kind of partner we aim to be for our customers and everyone they work with, too.

belief2.title: We see compliance as an opportunity, not an obstacle
belief2.description: At Ditto, we see compliance as a chance to showcase your leadership, take pride in your CSR practices, and partner with people who share your values.

belief3.title: When sustainable businesses win, we all win
belief3.description: We think building sustainability into your business is one of the surest ways to future proof it. It's a win-win for the planet, your partners, and your business.

commitments.title: We're committed to a sustainable future for everyone

ecovadisPartner.title: We're EcoVadis training partners
ecovadisPartner.description: We've been working with EcoVadis since 2023 to increase sustainability in supply chains, one CSR program at a time.

efrag.title: Ditto is a Friend of EFRAG
efrag.description: We support EFRAG's work to promote standard sustainability reporting practices across Europe.

platinum.title: Ditto is EcoVadis Platinum
platinum.description: We've put our methodology to the test on our own business and earned the highest EcoVadis rating.

ungc.title: UN Global Compact
ungc.description: Our membership in the UN Global Compact means we're putting our values to work to build a sustainable business and a better world.

careersIntro.label: Careers
careersIntro.title: We're all copilots on this journey
careersIntro.description: This work is about building better together—and that starts with our team. If you want to work on the future of sustainable business, we'd love to hear from you.

investors.title: Our investors
investors.subtitle: Partnership is in our DNA and we're proud to work with many of the best.

hero.title:
Great businesses 
aren't built alone
hero.subtitle: That's the idea at the heart of Ditto. We're here to help people do their best work together, and that starts with our team.

teams.title: Many teams, one vision
teams.subtitle: Compliance is complex—that's exactly what makes this work so exciting. Each team at Ditto plays a unique and interconnected role in realizing our mission.

engineering.title: Product & Engineering
engineering.description: We're putting technology to work on some of our customers' most challenging problems. Our Product and Engineering teams work hard to make it not only easy, but enjoyable.

customerSuccess.title: Customer Success
customerSuccess.description: Our Customer Success team listens deeply and works actively to incorporate our customers' needs and feedback into Ditto, so that we're always getting better.

growth.title: Growth
growth.description: The more customers we can serve, the better off our world will be. Our Growth team helps us reach as many people as we can to make CSR and compliance easy for all.

partnerships.title: Partnerships
partnerships.description: The right partners can have a major impact. Our Partnerships team looks for opportunities to grow alongside likeminded folks while serving our customers.

sales.title: Sales
sales.description: Our Sales team gives our customers their first experience of Ditto. From the start, we're here to help, freeing them up from their biggest CSR and compliance challenges.

expertise.title: Expertise
expertise.description: Our Expertise team gives our customers a competitive edge by embedding their deep framework knowledge into our products and experiences.

noEgo.title: We have no ego
noEgo.description: This is a team sport. We lead with humility and put each other first.

ownIt.title: We own it
ownIt.description: We roll up our sleeves and do what it takes. Think it, do it, own it.

impact.title: We have impact
impact.description: Our customers are our number one priority. We keep our eyes on the prize, always.

relentless.title: We are relentless
relentless.description: Never sit still. We are obsessed with what's next and what's possible, always looking forward.

interviewing.title: Interviewing at Ditto
interviewing.subtitle: We aim to be as sustainable and transparent as we can with our hiring practices. Regardless of role, the process typically takes 2-3 weeks from first call to final offer.

hero.title: A tailored quote
hero.subtitle: Pricing depends on your frameworks, your size and your goals. Share a few details and we'll send a tailored quote, and book time with an expert who'll walk you through it.

calendar.title: Or pick a time that works
calendar.subtitle: Grab 30 minutes with our team to get your quote and see Ditto in action.

hero.title: See Ditto in action
hero.subtitle: Book a 30-minute call with our team. We'll look at your frameworks, show you Ditto live, and map out the fastest route to audit-ready.

approach.title: Our approach to the EcoVadis assessment
approach.subtitle: We've studied EcoVadis so you don't have to. Our proprietary methodology follows four proven steps, and our dedicated coaches will help customize a precise approach for you.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Set your top priorities
step1.description: Start by choosing which issues are most important to you and where you'd like to improve. You'll work with your coach to make sure your platform reflects your priorities and create an action plan for your goals.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: Organize your data—and your team
step2.description: Bring all of your documents, data, and evidence onto a single platform that your stakeholders can access and update over time. Monitor your progress across frameworks on a central dashboard to keep everything on track.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: Build a solid, structured CSR program
step3.description: Ditto has embedded templates and tools to help you build smarter policies and procedures. Our experts will help you adapt your content to the EcoVadis requirements and connect the dots between your documents and values.

step4.label: Step 4
step4.title: Maintain or improve your performance, year after year
step4.description: Use Ditto to keep your content up to date and organized over time. With a unified document base, you'll be ahead of the game for your EcoVadis assessment each year.

carousel.title: Reuse your data for all of your CSR and compliance needs

testimonials.title: Ditto works for all kinds of teams
testimonials.subtitle: Teams across industries and around the world are using Ditto to improve their EcoVadis performance and impress their partners.

cta.title: Ready to get compliant? Ditto.
cta.subtitle: Turn your CSR program into a strategic advantage with a compliance copilot that's with you every step of the way.

hero.title: Answer your clients' carbon requests, without the complexity
hero.subtitle: Your buyers now assess suppliers on climate, through EcoVadis, CDP, and their RFPs. Ditto structures your emissions data across scopes 1, 2, and 3, gets you compliant, and turns your <pillar>carbon footprint</pillar> into a commercial argument. An expert with you every step of the way.

approach.title: Our approach to your carbon footprint
approach.subtitle: We've broken the carbon footprint down into clear steps, from defining your scope to driving reduction. You move forward step by step, with a proven method that adapts to your data and your organization.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Define your scope
step1.description: We start by framing the assessment: which entities, which sites, which base year, and which scopes you need to cover. Your Ditto coach helps you set a clear scope, the condition for an accurate footprint you can compare year over year.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: Collect and centralize your emissions data
step2.description: Energy, fuel, travel, purchases, freight: Ditto centralizes your activity data and supporting documents in one place. Data collection, the longest phase of a first assessment, becomes structured and collaborative across your teams.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: Calculate and prioritize your hotspots
step3.description: Ditto applies reference emission factors, converts your data into tonnes of CO2 equivalent, and surfaces the items that weigh the most. You finally know where to focus, instead of working blind.

step4.label: Step 4
step4.title: Reduce and steer, year after year
step4.description: An assessment without an action plan is a diagnosis without treatment. Ditto connects your emissions, your reduction actions, and your transition plan on a single roadmap, and helps you progress each cycle. A dedicated coach passes on the method so you become autonomous.

carousel.title: Reuse your data for all of your CSR and compliance needs

testimonials.title: Ditto works for all kinds of teams
testimonials.subtitle: Whether it's your first carbon footprint or a regulatory update, Ditto adapts to your organization and helps you gain efficiency at every step.

cta.title: Ready to get compliant? Ditto.
cta.subtitle: Make your carbon footprint a commercial asset: measure, get compliant, and prove it to your clients, with an expert copilot at every step.

hero.title: Maximize your CDP score with less efforts
hero.subtitle: Ditto helps you structure your climate data and streamline your CDP response by combining embedded expertise with AI, so you can boost your score and demonstrate real progress.

approach.title: Our approach to the CDP assessment
approach.subtitle: We've broken down the CDP into a simple, actionable process. Our AI-supported methodology follows four key steps, and our team of experts will guide you all the way through.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Identify the gaps in your questionnaire
step1.description: Begin by identifying the data you already have and where your biggest gaps are. You'll work with your coach to prioritize the most relevant CDP topics, organize your documents, and define a plan of action tailored to your maturity level.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: Organize your data and your team
step2.description: Centralize your emissions data, internal documents, and climate policies on a single platform. Your team can contribute asynchronously, while AI helps surface missing pieces and track readiness across CDP sections.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: Build a credible, well-structured disclosure
step3.description: Use Ditto's templates and AI-generated suggestions to accelerate your response drafting. From GHG inventories to transition plans, everything is aligned with CDP's expectations and built to support your score.

step4.label: Step 4
step4.title: Improve your performance, every year
step4.description: Keep your documentation up to date and versioned with Ditto. Reuse and adapt your content easily with AI support. With one unified workspace, your CDP submission becomes faster and easier year after year.

hero.title: AI-powered platform for CSRD and VSME compliance
hero.subtitle: Ditto helps you prepare a complete, compliant sustainability report under CSRD /VSME by combining embedded expertise, AI, and smart templates. So you can move fast, stay structured, and publish on time.

approach.title: Our approach to CSRD / VSME compliance
approach.subtitle: We make CSRD manageable: with Ditto, you'll work through each requirement step by step, using clear guidance, smart templates, and expert coaching to get the job done.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Map your data and identify your gaps
step1.description: Start by scanning your current data coverage against CSRD or VSME requirements. We'll help you identify what's missing and prioritize what to collect next. This includes policies, metrics, risk data, and upstream/downstream insights.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: Structure your disclosures across ESRS topics
step2.description: Once your topics are defined, Ditto gives you a clean, guided structure to work through each ESRS standard. Your team can contribute asynchronously, while our platform helps you align answers, source evidence, and avoid inconsistencies. Live dashboards track your progress across environmental, social, and governance sections.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: Draft your report using AI and expert support
step3.description: Our embedded AI helps you write faster and smarter—suggesting content based on your documents, indicators, and frameworks. Then our coaches review and help finalize it, making sure every disclosure is compliant, auditable, and clear.

step4.label: Step 4
step4.title: Validate, publish, and improve every year
step4.description: Your report is versioned, structured, and ready to be audited. We help you stay ready for third-party assurance, reuse your data each year, and evolve your sustainability narrative over time.

carousel.title: Reuse your data for all of your CSR and compliance needs

testimonials.title: Ditto works for all kinds of teams
testimonials.subtitle: Whether you're a fast-growing SME or part of a listed group, Ditto makes it easy to meet CSRD requirements with less stress and fewer surprises.

cta.title: Ready to get compliant? Ditto.
cta.subtitle: Move faster, avoid blind spots, and build a credible CSRD or VSME report from day one.

hero.title: ISO 14001 compliance made simple
hero.subtitle: Ditto provides you with the tools to build and maintain a strong Environmental Management System (EMS) and meet ISO 14001 requirements—faster, and without the usual stress.

approach.title: Our approach to the ISO 14001 certification
approach.subtitle: We've made ISO 14001 straightforward. Our platform gives you the tools, templates, and expert guidance to build your system, meet the requirements, and stay audit-ready over time.

step1.label: Step 1
step1.title: Build your Environmental Management System
step1.description: Start by setting the foundation: define your EMS scope, environmental policy, objectives, and roles. Use Ditto's templates to structure each piece clearly and ensure alignment with the standard from day one.

step2.label: Step 2
step2.title: Meet ISO 14001 requirements
step2.description: Once your system is structured, we help you fill the gaps. With AI suggestions and expert validation, you'll ensure your procedures, documentation, and controls meet ISO 14001 expectations across all clauses.

step3.label: Step 3
step3.title: Prepare your audit with confidence
step3.description: When it's time to audit, you won't be scrambling. Ditto helps you structure your audit folder, tag required documents, and assign reviewers. Internal and external audits are supported with live status tracking and smart checklists.

step4.label: Step 4
step4.title: Maintain your compliance year after year
step4.description: ISO 14001 is not a one-off project. Ditto helps you update your EMS as your business evolves. Keep policies current, track objectives, and document improvements automatically over time so you're always ready for what's next.

carousel.title: Reuse your data for all of your CSR and compliance needs

testimonials.title: Ditto works for all kinds of teams
testimonials.subtitle: Whether you're launching your EMS or maintaining certification, Ditto helps teams of all sizes stay on track and pass audits without last-minute chaos.

cta.title: Ready to get ISO compliant? Ditto.
cta.subtitle: Build a strong EMS, close compliance gaps, and stay audit-ready.

ctaPill.title: One platform to power your progress
ctaPill.paragraph: Ditto gives you the insights and tools to transform your CSR program. So you can feel confident when it's time for certification and feel ready for your next RFP.

newsletterForm.success: Thank you! Your submission has been received!
newsletterForm.error: Oops! Something went wrong while submitting the form.

home.title: Ditto – Your CSR copilot | More impact, less effort
home.description: Ditto empowers SMEs and mid-sized enterprises to build reliable, structured, and value-driven CSR strategies through a platform and expert guidance on EcoVadis, CSRD, ISO, and CDP.

frameworksEcovadis.title: EcoVadis made easy with Ditto - 500+ companies supported
frameworksEcovadis.description: Ditto helps you structure your CSR approach and complete the EcoVadis assessment with ease, so you get the medal you deserve each year.

frameworksCsrd.title: AI-powered platform for CSRD and VSME compliance
frameworksCsrd.description: Reporting under CSRD or VSME? Ditto helps you navigate disclosures, structure data, and publish faster with built-in AI and expert guidance.

frameworksCarbon.title: Answer your clients' carbon requests, without the complexity
frameworksCarbon.description: Your clients are asking for your carbon footprint. Structure scopes 1, 2, and 3, get compliant, and win business, with Ditto's platform and expertise.

frameworksCdp.title: How to simplify your CDP disclosure effectively
frameworksCdp.description: Ditto helps you structure climate data and streamline your CDP response with AI and embedded expertise to boost your score and show real progress.

frameworksIso14001.title: ISO 14001 compliance in no time, without the stress
frameworksIso14001.description: Prepare for ISO 14001 certification without stress. Ditto helps you structure your EMS, close gaps, and pass audits faster with AI and expert support.

frameworksIndex.title: Frameworks
frameworksIndex.description: Discover Ditto's sustainability reporting frameworks to simplify data management, boost ESG performance, and strengthen your long-term impact worldwide.

solutionsManagement.title: A central place for all your CSR & compliance knowledge
solutionsManagement.description: Ditto is a single source of truth for your team's CSR and compliance data, so you can easily search, collaborate, and improve over time.

solutionsQuestionnaires.title: Automate compliance questionnaires & answer 10x faster
solutionsQuestionnaires.description: Speed up your compliance process with Ditto's questionnaire automation. Centralize answers, reuse past responses, and reduce reporting time by up to 90%.

solutionsAi.title: AI solutions built for sustainability and ESG teams
solutionsAi.description: From setting smart goals to drafting reports and automating responses, Ditto's AI helps teams move faster and smarter across CSRD, EcoVadis, CDP, and ISO.

solutionsSupplier.title: Streamline supplier ESG data collection at scale
solutionsSupplier.description: Collect, verify, and manage ESG data from suppliers fast. Ditto helps you drive engagement, track progress, and centralize documentation on one platform.

customerStories.title: Customer Stories – 500+ industry leaders choose Ditto
customerStories.description: Discover how hundreds of companies use Ditto to confidently build trust and manage their CSR and compliance programs.

resources.title: CSR & compliance resources
resources.description: Discover how Ditto's automation and AI tools help your team simplify CSR compliance, strengthen practices, and build trust across EcoVadis, CDP, and ISO.

resourcesBlog.title: Blog – resources, tips, best practices, and news
resourcesBlog.description: Read the latest industry insights on CSR and compliance news and trends, learn best practices, and get insight from experts on the Ditto blog.

resourcesNews.title: CSR & CSRD News Hub
resourcesNews.description: Stay up to date with Ditto's latest news, partnerships, and insights on sustainability reporting and corporate transparency.

resourcesGuides.title: Resources & Guides
resourcesGuides.description: Get actionable CSR and compliance resources with Ditto guides. Learn best practices, use checklists, and gain valuable insights from experts.

getStarted.title: Book a Ditto demo
getStarted.description: See Ditto live. Book a 30-minute call to walk through your frameworks and the fastest path to audit-ready, with a CSR and compliance expert.

pricing.title: Ditto pricing – a quote built around your program
pricing.description: Pricing depends on your frameworks, your size and your goals. Share a few details and get a tailored quote, plus time with an expert who'll walk you through it.

manifesto.title: Ditto's manifesto: help businesses build trust and build better, together
manifesto.description: Every partner you pick, every supplier you choose, every customer you serve – they're all part of your story. Building trust isn't easy. Ditto changes that.

careers.title: Careers at Ditto – Great businesses aren't built alone
careers.description: That's the idea at the heart of Ditto. We're here to help people do their best work together, and that starts with our team.

legalTerms.title: Terms and Conditions
legalTerms.description: Review Ditto's terms and conditions to understand how to use the platform safely and in compliance with applicable laws.

legalPrivacy.title: Privacy Policy
legalPrivacy.description: Learn how Ditto protects your personal data, ensures transparency, and upholds your privacy rights in compliance with regulations.

legalNotices.title: Legal Note
legalNotices.description: Access Ditto's legal information, including publisher details, intellectual property rights, and website terms of use.
